Conects to an Azure SQL Database and execute scripts located in the scripts folder.

Usage: Upgrade -c <Connectionstring> -t <AADTenantId> --ClientId <ClientId> --ClientSecretKey <clientSecretKey> --ScriptsFolder <ScriptsFolder>

Options:

  -c | --ConnectionString  <TEXT>  []
  A valid Azure SQL ConnectionString

  -t | --AADTenantId       <TEXT>  []
  Azure Active Directory Tenant Id

  --ClientId               <TEXT>  []
  Your SPN Client Id

  --ClientSecretKey        <TEXT>  []
  Your SPN Client Secret Key

  --ScriptsFolder          <TEXT>  []
  The path for sql dml and ddl scripts folder
